description: Desktop save path regression net (0.70): the pause menu's Save/Load dialog must write manual saves to user://saves/ (writable in exported builds) — NOT the legacy res://saves/ (read-only inside an exported PCK, which silently broke saving on the itch.io Linux / Steam Deck build) — and must list the save when the dialog reopens. Drives the real UI: Escape opens the pause menu, its Save/Load button opens the dialog, the dialog's own Save button performs the save.

steps.script:
var d = tree.root.get_node("/root/Main/SaveLoadDialog")
d.save_name_input.text = "ScenarioDialogSave"
d.save_button.pressed.emit()
return true
